name: Quarterly Review Infographics
tagline: White business-review infographic deck with condensed black headings, thin data cards, and muted teal, peach, navy, and brown analytics visuals.

palette.description: Crisp white background with black condensed headings, soft grey card rules, and muted teal, peach, navy, and coffee-brown chart accents.

typography.style: tall condensed headings paired with neutral sans body copy for dense business analytics slides

best_for: Quarterly business reviews, sales updates, operating dashboards, and performance-report decks where the audience needs to scan many charts, cards, and KPI blocks quickly.
avoid_for: Narrative keynote decks, brand manifestos, or highly emotional presentations where the plain spreadsheet-like information design would feel too utilitarian.
